name: obsidian-alchemist
description: The Alchemist: A modular super-plugin for TextBundle, Audio conversion, and Data purity.

scripts.build: tsc -noEmit && node esbuild.config.mjs production && cp manifest.json styles.css dist/
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: Kharizma & Latreia
